Landing.title: Find Your Perfect
Landing.description: From Tallinn to Bora Bora — port booking and management made easy

HowItWorks.title: How it works
HowItWorks.subtitle: Three steps from idle dock to confirmed reservation.
HowItWorks.step1Desc: Browse marinas on the interactive map or ask our assistant where to dock next.
HowItWorks.step2Desc: Add one berth or string together a multi-stop route. Your trip stays in draft until you're ready to commit.
HowItWorks.step3Desc: One click reserves every berth in your trip. We'll keep your reservations together and your dates protected.

Berths.title: Available Berths & Marina Slips
Berths.subtitle: From cozy marina slips for sailboats to large-capacity berths for yachts. Real-time availability.
Berths.empty: No berths found for this port.

FooterNav.desc: From Tallinn to Bora Bora — port booking and management made easy

ChatWidget.title: Marina Assistant
ChatWidget.disclaimer: Powered by AI - Responses may vary
ChatWidget.welcome: Welcome to Habora! I am your AI marina assistant connected to live port availability. How can I help you book a berth today?
ChatWidget.signInCta: Sign in to start a trip

Auth.title: Welcome Back
Auth.subtitle: Sign in to access your marina dashboard
Auth.wrongAccount: This account is for vessel operators. Please use the mobile app.

SignUp.title: Create Account
SignUp.subtitle: Sign up to start managing your marina
SignUp.success: Account created! Check your email for verification.
SignUp.weakPassword: Password must be at least 8 characters long.

DashboardError.title: Something went wrong
DashboardError.description: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

BerthManager.title: Berth Manager
BerthManager.subtitle: View, add, and update berth details for your marina
BerthManager.description: berths across all facilities. Click edit to modify.
BerthManager.name: Name
BerthManager.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this berth? This action cannot be undone.
BerthManager.deleteDescription: This will permanently remove this berth and all associated data. This action cannot be undone.
BerthManager.emptyDescription: Get started by adding your first berth to the marina.
BerthManager.errorDescription: We couldn't load your berth data. Please try again.

BookingsPage.title: Bookings
BookingsPage.subtitle: Manage berth reservations and customer schedules
BookingsPage.cancelDescription: Are you sure you want to cancel this booking? The customer will be notified.
BookingsPage.emptyDescription: Bookings will appear here when customers reserve berths at your marina.
BookingsPage.errorDescription: We couldn't load your booking data. Please try again.
BookingsPage.alreadyCancelled: This booking has already been cancelled.

SettingsPage.title: Agent Settings
SettingsPage.subtitle: Configure your AI assistant and application preferences
SettingsPage.aiConfigDesc: Customize how your AI assistant behaves and responds
SettingsPage.systemPromptPlaceholder: Enter instructions for how your AI assistant should behave...
SettingsPage.systemPromptHelp: This prompt defines the personality, knowledge, and behavior of your marina AI assistant.
SettingsPage.streamingDesc: Show AI responses as they generate
SettingsPage.codeHighlightDesc: Syntax highlight code blocks in responses
SettingsPage.notifDesc: Choose how you want to be notified
SettingsPage.notifBookingsDesc: Get notified when a berth booking is confirmed
SettingsPage.notifArrivalsDesc: Receive alerts when vessels arrive at marina
SettingsPage.notifReportsDesc: Receive a weekly summary of marina activities
SettingsPage.changePasswordDesc: Update your password regularly for security
SettingsPage.twoFactorDesc: Add an extra layer of security
SettingsPage.deleteAccountDesc: Permanently delete your account and all associated data
SettingsPage.promptTooLong: System prompt must be under 2000 characters.

FeaturedPorts.title: Featured Ports & Marinas
FeaturedPorts.subtitle: Discover premium harbours across Estonia. Each port offers unique facilities, locations, and berth options for every type of vessel.
FeaturedPorts.empty: No ports available at the moment.

NotFound.heading: This page has drifted off course
NotFound.description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved. Let's get you back on track.

GlobalError.title: Something went wrong
GlobalError.description: An unexpected error occurred. Our team has been notified. Please try reloading the page.

CheckEmail.title: Check your email
CheckEmail.description: We sent a confirmation link to your email. Click it to activate your account and access the dashboard.
CheckEmail.noEmail: Email not found. Please sign up again.
CheckEmail.resendSuccess: A new confirmation email has been sent.

WrongAccount.title: Vessel Operator Account
WrongAccount.description: The web dashboard is exclusively for port managers. Vessel operators can browse and book ports using the Habora mobile app.
WrongAccount.mobileAppDesc: Download Habora to manage your vessel and bookings.
WrongAccount.signInDifferent: Sign in with a different account

Trip.empty: Your trip is empty. Chat with the assistant to add stops.
Trip.confirmConflict: One of your berths was just booked. Please remove the conflicting item and try again.
Trip.cancelDialogMessage: All pending bookings will be removed.

PortDetail.berthTaken: This berth was just taken. Try different dates.
